fields.title: Implement message injection helpers
fields.description:
## Task

Implement helpers for injecting `AGENT_CONTEXT:` notices into messages, following the sandbox injection pattern.

## File

- `extensions/tau/src/sandbox/agent-awareness/injection.ts`

## API

- `buildAgentContextNotice(opts: { count: number; pids?: number[] }): string`
  - `count > 0`: include count (and maybe pids summary)
  - `count === 0`: return `AGENT_CONTEXT: no other agents detected`

- `injectAgentContextIntoMessages<T extends { role: string; content?: any }>(messages: T[], noticeText: string): T[]`
  - Prepend to last user message as `content[0]`
  - If already present (content[0] starts with `AGENT_CONTEXT:`), return unchanged
  - Do not mutate input array

## DoD

- Unit tests for both helpers
fields.close_reason: Implemented AGENT_CONTEXT notice builder + message injection helper
